channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Mediana for POP TV, 23–26 February 2026 – Seat Projections for the Parties
item.description:
• Demokrati (EPP): 0–1 seats
  • Nova Slovenija–Krščanski demokrati (EPP): 0 seats
  • Slovenska nacionalna stranka (PfE): 0 seats
  • Stranka generacij–Zeleni Slovenije (RE): 0 seats
  • Prerod – Stranka Vladimirja Prebiliča (Greens/EFA): 0 seats
  • Gibanje Svoboda (RE): 2–4 seats
  • Mi, socialisti! (*): 0 seats
  • Levica (GUE/NGL): 0–1 seats
  • Glas upokojencev (*): 0 seats
  • Piratska stranka Slovenije (Greens/EFA): 0 seats
  • Stranka ZAUPANJE (*): 0 seats
  • Resni.ca (NI): 0–1 seats
  • Slovenska demokratska stranka (EPP): 4–5 seats
  • Socialni demokrati (S&D): 0–1 seats
  • VESNA–Zelena stranka (Greens/EFA): 0 seats
  • Slovenska ljudska stranka (EPP): 0 seats
  • FOKUS – za Slovenijo s ciljem (*): 0 seats

item.title: Opinion Poll by Mediana for POP TV, 23–26 February 2026 – Seat Projections for a Selection of Coalitions
item.description: TBD

item.title: Opinion Poll by Mediana for POP TV, 23–26 February 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Demokrati (EPP): 5.0–9.2%
  • Nova Slovenija–Krščanski demokrati (EPP): 2.6–5.8%
  • Slovenska nacionalna stranka (PfE): 1.6–4.3%
  • Stranka generacij–Zeleni Slovenije (RE): 0.7–2.7%
  • Prerod – Stranka Vladimirja Prebiliča (Greens/EFA): 1.6–4.3%
  • Gibanje Svoboda (RE): 19.2–26.1%
  • Mi, socialisti! (*): 1.2–3.6%
  • Levica (GUE/NGL): 4.3–8.2%
  • Glas upokojencev (*): 0.0–1.0%
  • Piratska stranka Slovenije (Greens/EFA): 2.1–5.2%
  • Stranka ZAUPANJE (*): 0.4–2.0%
  • Resni.ca (NI): 3.4–7.0%
  • Slovenska demokratska stranka (EPP): 27.2–34.8%
  • Socialni demokrati (S&D): 4.7–8.8%
  • VESNA–Zelena stranka (Greens/EFA): 2.0–4.9%
  • Slovenska ljudska stranka (EPP): 0.7–2.7%
  • FOKUS – za Slovenijo s ciljem (*): 0.3–1.8%

item.title: Opinion Poll by Ninamedia for Dnevnik, 23–25 February 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Demokrati (EPP): 6.2–9.7%
  • Nova Slovenija–Krščanski demokrati (EPP): 4.5–7.5%
  • Slovenska nacionalna stranka (PfE): 0.6–2.1%
  • Stranka generacij–Zeleni Slovenije (RE): 0.3–1.4%
  • Prerod – Stranka Vladimirja Prebiliča (Greens/EFA): 2.0–4.2%
  • Gibanje Svoboda (RE): 24.3–29.9%
  • Mi, socialisti! (*): 1.0–2.7%
  • Levica (GUE/NGL): 3.9–6.8%
  • Glas upokojencev (*): 0.2–1.2%
  • Piratska stranka Slovenije (Greens/EFA): 1.0–2.6%
  • Stranka ZAUPANJE (*): 0.4–1.5%
  • Resni.ca (NI): 1.8–3.9%
  • Slovenska demokratska stranka (EPP): 25.3–31.0%
  • Socialni demokrati (S&D): 6.6–10.1%
  • VESNA–Zelena stranka (Greens/EFA): 1.9–4.0%
  • Slovenska ljudska stranka (EPP): 1.4–3.4%
  • FOKUS – za Slovenijo s ciljem (*): 0.6–2.1%

item.title: Opinion Poll by Valicon for TSmedia, 20–23 February 2026 – Voting Intentions
item.description:
• Demokrati (EPP): 6.3–9.1%
  • Nova Slovenija–Krščanski demokrati (EPP): 2.8–4.8%
  • Slovenska nacionalna stranka (PfE): 3.0–5.1%
  • Stranka generacij–Zeleni Slovenije (RE): 1.1–2.4%
  • Prerod – Stranka Vladimirja Prebiliča (Greens/EFA): 3.5–5.7%
  • Gibanje Svoboda (RE): 20.8–25.3%
  • Mi, socialisti! (*): 1.5–3.0%
  • Levica (GUE/NGL): 3.3–5.5%
  • Glas upokojencev (*): 1.1–2.4%
  • Piratska stranka Slovenije (Greens/EFA): 2.0–3.7%
  • Resni.ca (NI): 3.4–5.6%
  • Slovenska demokratska stranka (EPP): 24.2–28.9%
  • Socialni demokrati (S&D): 7.1–10.1%
  • VESNA–Zelena stranka (Greens/EFA): 1.6–3.2%
  • Slovenska ljudska stranka (EPP): 0.9–2.1%
  • FOKUS – za Slovenijo s ciljem (*): 0.4–1.3%
